description: 动态压并发(wire-protocol §2.1):心跳下发 desiredMaxConcurrent:2 → SDK 把有效本地并发上限收敛到 2(effectiveMaxConcurrent:2)。schema 新增 optional 字段 effectiveMaxConcurrent,各决策核在 apply-heartbeat 时,当 desiredMaxConcurrent>0 则产出该字段;null/缺省则省略(沿用本地配置,见 03)。

then.sdkExpectedAction: adjust (clamp) the effective local concurrency cap down to the platform-suggested desiredMaxConcurrent (2)
sdkMustNot: raise concurrency above the suggested cap
